name: Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Make cornbread.
2. Mix 3/4 cup cornbread with 1/4 cup white bread crumbs.
3. Add all other ingredients.
4. Pour mixture into a large, rectangular baking pan that has been lightly greased.
5. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit until brown and bubbling.
6. Serve hot.
